skill.name: SEO Meta Optimizer
skill.description: Creates optimized meta titles, descriptions, and URL suggestions based on character limits and best practices
skill.summary: Generate search-optimized metadata that improves click-through rates and search visibility
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 1 file (95 lines) and found zero security issues. The skill provides metadata optimization guidance without any network, filesystem, or external command access. Safe for publication.

content.user_title: Optimize Meta Tags for Better SEO Rankings
content.value_statement: Poor metadata hurts search visibility and click-through rates. This skill creates compelling, character-compliant meta titles, descriptions, and URLs that drive organic traffic.
actual_capabilities: Generate optimized title tags within 50-60 character limits
Create compelling meta descriptions of 150-160 characters
Suggest SEO-friendly URL structures under 60 characters
Provide A/B test variations for metadata elements
Include emotional triggers and power words in copy
Validate character counts for mobile and desktop display
limitations: Cannot directly modify website files or CMS settings
Requires user to provide content context and target keywords
Does not perform actual search ranking analysis or tracking

use_cases.title: Blog Post Optimization
use_cases.description: Generate optimized metadata for new blog posts to improve search visibility and click-through rates from search results

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Pages
use_cases.description: Create compelling product page metadata that highlights unique selling points and drives organic traffic to product listings

use_cases.title: Landing Page SEO
use_cases.description: Optimize landing page metadata for specific campaigns with targeted keywords and persuasive call-to-action elements

prompt_templates.title: Basic Meta Tag Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create meta title and description for a blog post about [TOPIC]. Target keyword: [KEYWORD]. Keep title under 60 characters and description under 160 characters.

prompt_templates.title: URL Structure Optimization
prompt_templates.prompt: Suggest an SEO-friendly URL structure for a page about [CONTENT_TOPIC]. The URL should be under 60 characters, use hyphens, and include the primary keyword [KEYWORD].

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Variation A/B Testing
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate 5 different meta title and description variations for [PAGE_CONTENT]. Include emotional triggers, numbers, and different CTA approaches. Provide character counts for each.

prompt_templates.title: Platform-Specific Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create metadata for [CONTENT] and provide implementation guidance for [PLATFORM: WordPress/Next.js/Astro]. Include Yoast/RankMath settings or component code structure.

output_examples.input: Blog post about sustainable gardening tips for beginners
output_examples.output:
URL: /sustainable-gardening-tips-beginners
Title: Sustainable Gardening Tips for Beginners | Start Growing (54 chars)
Description: Learn eco-friendly gardening techniques. Step-by-step guide for beginners with proven tips. Start your sustainable garden today!

output_examples.input: Product page for wireless noise-canceling headphones
output_examples.output:
URL: /wireless-noise-canceling-headphones
Title: Best Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones 2026 | Premium Audio (58 chars)
Description: Experience crystal-clear sound with advanced noise cancellation. Free shipping. 30-day returns. Shop premium wireless headphones now.

best_practices: Place primary keywords in the first 30 characters of title tags for maximum SEO impact
Include action verbs and clear benefits in meta descriptions to improve click-through rates
Use hyphens and lowercase letters in URLs, removing stop words for cleaner structure
anti_patterns: Avoid keyword stuffing in meta tags as it harms readability and search rankings
Do not exceed character limits or search engines will truncate your metadata in results
Never use generic or duplicate meta descriptions across multiple pages

faq.question: What are the ideal character limits for meta tags?
faq.answer: Title tags should be 50-60 characters. Meta descriptions work best at 150-160 characters. URLs should stay under 60 characters for optimal display in search results.

faq.question: How often should I update my metadata?
faq.answer: Review and update metadata quarterly or when search rankings decline. Refresh titles with current year and update descriptions based on performance data.

faq.question: Do meta descriptions directly affect search rankings?
faq.answer: Meta descriptions do not directly impact rankings, but they significantly affect click-through rates which indirectly influence search performance.

faq.question: Should I include my brand name in title tags?
faq.answer: For well-known brands, place the brand at the end. For lesser-known brands, focus on keywords first and add the brand only if space permits.

faq.question: What are power words and why do they matter?
faq.answer: Power words like 'proven', 'essential', 'ultimate' trigger emotional responses and increase click-through rates by making titles more compelling.

faq.question: Can this skill generate metadata for any website platform?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill provides universal metadata recommendations and includes specific guidance for WordPress, Next.js, Astro, and other common platforms.
